title: malvastrum viscidum
intro: Malvastrum viscidum, also known as the sticky malvastrum, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malvastrum viscidum include treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Malvastrum viscidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
